data.content: Plan review sent c8f4 back to planning. Main gaps: validation is only warning-based, so supported targets are not actually enforced; the plan does not resolve canonical naming across remote_main, commit, and merged_main_commit; and backward-compat behavior for legacy OutputMode values versus new canonical targets is underspecified. Revise the plan around a single runtime target vocabulary plus explicit legacy normalization and test coverage for both canonical and legacy forms.
